title: AFFORDABLE HOUSING - 211info
text: ACCESS AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Maintains a list of affordable housing providers and their rental properties. Applications and information for properties managed by ACCESS are also available. Properties may have waiting lists. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 779-6691 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 779-6691 Main phone Main phone (541) 779-6691 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Listing Services for Landlords/Property Managers Low Cost Home Rental Listings Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY DISASTER SERVICES - CENTER FOR COMMUNITY RESILIENCE FOOD - FOOD PANTRIES FOOD - SENIOR FOOD PANTRIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OVER THE TOP WIG PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS
